title: Modelling Insulin resistance in vitro
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"cc7gi","text":"This protocol contains the instruction for modelling insulin resistance in iPSC-derived neurons by depriving the cells of insulin overnight followed by a 30 minutes insulin treatment the following day. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: The media is removed from the cells
Fresh media is added the cells supplemented with B27 without insulin (Thermofisher A1895601).
Cells are left back in the incubator Overnight at 37 °C, and 5% CO2
The following day, insulin was added to the media at either 100 nanomolar (nM) , 250 nanomolar (nM) or 1 micromolar (µM) for 00:30:00
creator: Laura Mahoney-Sanchez
